titleEn: Pig Progress6 Pig reasons not to miss SPACE in 2026Jul 13Article
titleZh: 2026年SPACE展六大养猪创新：精准饲喂、AI胴体检测等获星级奖项
summaryZh: 2026年法国SPACE国际畜牧展将颁发32项Innov’SPACE创新奖，其中6项养猪创新获两星评级。亮点包括：Asserva的Materneo 4.0母猪精准饲喂系统（基于行为与仔猪增重实时调整营养）、Yxia的采精台（不锈钢+可丽耐材质，易清洁防污染）、Unissia的Pig’Scan AI胴体检测系统（自动识别损伤与性别）。这些技术融合IoT、AI与自动化，旨在提升猪场效率、动物福利与数据驱动决策。
featuredReason: 本文集中展示了2026年SPACE展上最具代表性的养猪业智能化创新，涵盖精准饲喂、AI视觉检测和自动化设备，是智慧畜牧从业者了解前沿技术趋势和选型参考的优质来源。
contentFull: 6 Pig reasons not to miss SPACE in 20266 pig-specific innovations will be awarded at the upcoming international animal husbandry show SPACE in Rennes, France, from 15–17 September 2026. All 6 have been credited with 1 Innov’SPACE star.Vincent ter BeekEditor of Pig Progress / Topic: Pigs around the worldJul 13ArticleThis year, 32 innovations at SPACE will receive an Innov’SPACE award. Photo: SPACEThe jury selected 32 innovations for an award this year. Whilst 26 received 1 star, 6 of them were awarded 2 stars. The jury’s top choices will be revealed at an Innov’SPACE event during the show, on 15 September.The following pig innovations can be found at the event:Precision feeding system for sows ⭐Asserva: Materneo 4.0Materneo 4.0 is a precision feeding system for sows in maternity pens, developed by French livestock equipment company Asserva. The system replaces theoretical feed plans with dynamic, individual adjustments. The feeding is controlled in real time based on the sow’s behaviour, actual consumption and intake capacity. The system integrates automated piglet weighing to measure growth rates. This weight change of the litter serves as a direct indicator to correct nutritional inputs before visible losses occur. The system combines 3 modules:individualised distribution in fractionated doses;animal performance measurement; anda nutritional algorithm.The objective is twofold: maximising the piglets’ ADG during this critical phase, and preserving the sow’s body condition to optimise recovery and future reproductive performance. Each pen becomes an autonomous decision-making unit driven by data. (Hall 8, A21)Artificial insemination dummy for boar semen collection ⭐Yxia: Mounting dummyThe boar mounting dummy is an essential tool for collecting semen for artificial insemination. The purpose of this product is to allow the animal to position itself comfortably on it while keeping its penis accessible for stimulation and collection. This dummy stands out for its structure, as it was designed for optimal cleaning thanks to its easily accessible parts. It also features a single, angled, off-centre stand to optimise space around the animal’s penis and facilitate the operator’s movements. In terms of materials, it is made of stainless steel – robust and highly corrosion-resistant – and its top surface is made of corian, a combination of resin and mineral powder. The latter is non-porous and impact-resistant. It is the combination of these innovative features that allows for the design of an ergonomic and durable mannequin, while reducing the risk of bacterial contamination during semen collection. (Hall 8, B32)Automatic detection of lesions and sex of pig carcasses ⭐Unissia – Pig’ScanPig’Scan is an automated, AI-powered system for analysing pig carcasses, designed to monitor animal welfare, tail biting, and health indicators in slaughterhouses. It performs synchronised multi-view acquisition (back, head and tail area) to automatically quantify tail length, tail biting lesions, dorsal scratches, signs of fighting, transport-related injuries and certain potential indicators of animal abuse. Thanks to its machine vision algorithms and RFID traceability, it transforms previously subjective observations into statistically usable digital data. Analysing the carcass backs identifies scratches, impacts and lesions that may reveal problems related to stress, transport, animal density or husbandry practices. It provides standardised and reproducible measurements, automatic archiving of visual evidence, a reduction in manual monitoring workload. (Hall 8, A 23a)Simplifying deadstock management ⭐Maison Bleue: SanihouseSanihouse, designed by Innovlap and Maison Bleue, is a facility dedicated to managing deceased animals on farms. The facility is a structure made of insulated, precast reinforced concrete elements, featuring an assembly that includes a stainless-steel platform and automated, motorised gates. It makes the removal of deadstock both easier and safer. The platform’s motorisation is synchronised with the opening of the gates and is sized to hold rendering bins. These bins are automatically moved either to the “farming zone” side for loading carcasses, or to the “public zone” side, allowing the rendering service to collect them in complete autonomy. By isolating carcasses in an insulated facility equipped for easy cleaning and disinfection, ensuring independent access for the rendering service without entering the farm perimeter, and reducing handling, the system guarantees compliance with health regulations while simplifying deadstock management for farmers. (Outdoor, E21)Automatic piglet weight estimation⭐IMV Technologies: Smart WeightSmart Weight is an add-on feature to the Smart Counting platform, designed for piglets up to 10 kg leaving the farrowing unit. As animals move through the counting alley, the system automatically tracks them across multiple images, aggregates visual measurements and estimates the lot’s average weight and weight dispersion without manual weighing or a detour to a truck scale. A simple user calibration is sufficient, with no on-site installation and no specific preventive maintenance. That way a counter becomes an objective production-management tool: immediate, time-stamped data that can be integrated into farm-management software. It brings precision, consistency and a new uniformity indicator. Economically, it reduces collection time, transport costs and supports a recurring subscription model. (Hall 1, G76)Nutrition-environment assessment tool for the livestock industry ⭐IFIP: Foodbasket7The French Institute for Pork and Pig Research (IFIP) will launch Foodbasket7 at SPACE: a free web-based tool that allows members of the public to gain insight into the consequences of their dietary choices. They can create a weekly food basket in just a few minutes and the tool will then provide a simple and visual assessment of 2 complementary dimensions:the nutritional quality of the food, through coverage of 28 essential nutrients (proteins, vitamins, minerals, fatty acids) defined according to the user’s profile (age, sex, and physical activity);the environmental impacts of the food basket, such as greenhouse gas emissions, water consumption, land use, etc.Its innovation lies in its comprehensive approach, which allows for reasoning at the scale of a complete diet rather than on an individual food item basis. For livestock sectors, Foodbasket7 offers a scientific analysis framework that allows for valuing the contribution of animal products to a healthy, diverse and sustainable diet by integrating the nutritional density of the food. This tool is available free of charge on the IFIP website. (Hall 8, A23a)
translationZh:
今年，SPACE展的评审团共选出32项创新授予Innov’SPACE奖项。其中26项获得一星，6项获得两星。评审团的首选将在展会期间（9月15日）的Innov’SPACE活动中揭晓。

以下为展会上的养猪创新项目：

**母猪精准饲喂系统 ⭐**
Asserva: Materneo 4.0
Materneo 4.0是法国畜牧设备公司Asserva开发的母猪精准饲喂系统，适用于产房。该系统用动态、个体化的调整取代了理论饲喂计划。饲喂过程根据母猪的行为、实际采食量和采食能力进行实时控制。系统集成了自动仔猪称重功能，以测量生长速率。仔猪的体重变化可作为直接指标，在可见损失发生前修正营养输入。该系统结合了三个模块：
- 分次剂量的个体化分配；
- 动物性能测量；
- 营养算法。
其目标有两个：在此关键阶段最大化仔猪的平均日增重，并保持母猪体况以优化恢复和未来繁殖性能。每个产床都成为一个由数据驱动的自主决策单元。（8号馆，A21展位）

**用于公猪精液采集的人工授精假台 ⭐**
Yxia: Mounting dummy
公猪爬跨假台是采集人工授精用精液的重要工具。该产品的目的是让公猪舒适地定位在假台上，同时使其阴茎便于刺激和采集。这款假台的结构设计独特，因其部件易于拆卸而便于最佳清洁。它还采用了一个单柱、倾斜且偏心的支架，以优化公猪阴茎周围的空间，方便操作人员移动。在材料方面，它由坚固且高度耐腐蚀的不锈钢制成，其顶部表面由可丽耐（一种树脂与矿物粉末的复合材料）制成，后者无孔且耐冲击。正是这些创新特性的结合，使得设计出符合人体工程学且耐用的假台成为可能，同时降低了精液采集过程中细菌污染的风险。（8号馆，B32展位）

**猪胴体损伤与性别自动检测 ⭐**
Unissia – Pig’Scan
Pig’Scan是一个基于人工智能的自动化猪胴体分析系统，旨在屠宰场监测动物福利、咬尾行为和健康指标。它执行同步多视角采集（背部、头部和尾部区域），以自动量化尾巴长度
author: Vincent ter Beek
